product_results.title: LUCKY STEP Women's Retro Fashion Sneakers Non Slip Comfortable Casual Running Shoes Breathable Classic Walking Trainers

summary.text: The shoes are described as super cute and strike a balance between trendy. Customers find them to be quality school shoes and great shoes overall. They are super comfortable, with feet and legs not cramping or fatigued during wear. Customers are satisfied with the color, though they have mixed opinions about the size and fit.

authors_reviews.title: Great sneakers for fashion wear not sports, but great!
authors_reviews.text: These are so fabulous! Color is so amazing (baby blue) , so comfy and so stylish. Love the flatter sole as opposed to a chucky sole. I’m a 9.5 and ordered a 10. Fits perfectly. Get them!👍
authors_reviews.author: V

authors_reviews.title: Lucky shoes
authors_reviews.text: Really good quality.A little tight at first, but the more you wear it the more comfortable it gets
authors_reviews.author: Felly

authors_reviews.title: Nice quality
authors_reviews.text: Nice Quality, but a little on the Small Side. Consider ordering a Size Bigger.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Runs smallish but super cute
authors_reviews.text: Cute but fits tight. I got a 7 (normal size) and it pinches my toes. Returned them

authors_reviews.title: Cute and comfortable shoes
authors_reviews.text: Very cute and comfortable shoes, fast delivery and good quality.
